tasks.notes: Branched from main (15a7cdf) after pull. Branch feature/open-source created.

tasks.step: Add GitHub issue templates (bug_report.yml, feature_request.yml, config.yml)
tasks.notes: Created .github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/bug_report.yml, feature_request.yml, config.yml using GitHub YAML form schema.
Created .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md with summary, type of change, testing, and checklist sections.
Created CONTRIBUTING.md covering bug reporting, dev setup, tests, branch naming, commit convention, PR process, code style, and license.
Created CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md adopting Contributor Covenant v2.1 by reference. Enforcement contact: opensource@apralabs.com.
Created SECURITY.md with supported versions (0.1.x), private disclosure via security@apralabs.com, response timelines, and out-of-scope items.
Added ai-agent, anthropic, automation, claude, devtools, model-context-protocol, remote-execution to keywords array. Kept existing keywords, deduplicated, sorted alphabetically. Total: 13 keywords.

tasks.step: VERIFY: Phase 1 — run tests, build, push
